workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Working on Northwind Traders's migration architecture. Got the email thread -- help me create the summary.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-17 08:53 EST
Subject: migration architecture - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with migration architecture. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
Date: 2024-02-13 11:11 EST
Subject: URGENT: migration architecture Issue at Northwind Traders

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Sandra Taylor <sandra.taylor@northwindtra.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-19 10:28 EST
Subject: Follow-up: migration architecture Review

Our team encountered some challenges with migration architecture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Northwind Traders: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct migration architecture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
